final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial-style photo of Korean cafe coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays, no people, styled for Instagram.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic shot on smartphone — exact stylistic execution is yours; annotation overlay needs a white-pen hand-drawn sketch feel with rough, slightly uneven single-stroke lines tracing object outlines, arrows, and dotted sight-lines — exact line weight and sketch looseness are yours
Composition: must include multiple elements (drinks + desserts + cafe space details) with annotation overlays distributed across the frame, leaving intentional negative space between annotations
Subject: must include:
  - at least one coffee drink (latte / espresso / etc.)
  - at least one dessert or pastry
  - Korean cafe atmosphere details (tableware, surface, ambient decor)
  - hand-drawn white-pen outline traces around each element
  - arrows or dotted lines as visual guides between annotations and subjects
  - small decorative touches: steam wisps, sparkle marks, heart motifs, tiny emoji-like doodles (used sparingly)
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior or table surface as backdrop — no people
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, bright, Instagram-story atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, airy, fashionable direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs the annotation layer to feel like white gel-pen on photo — exact opacity and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) for each element, short diary-voice comments in the following style:
  - drink annotation: taste / temperature / mood (e.g., 「やさしい甘さ♡」「ほっとする～」)
  - food annotation: texture / deliciousness (e.g., 「しっとり最高」「さくさく！」)
  - space annotation: atmosphere (e.g., 「落ち着く…」「いい時間」)
  - overall one-liner (e.g., 「幸せすぎた～」)
Constraints: must preserve the "Instagram Stories × magazine rough-notes" finish — annotations must feel casual and emotional, not typeset; white hand-drawn lines must trace object outlines; negative space must remain between annotation clusters
Avoid: people / human figures; overcrowded annotations that eliminate breathing room; clean typeset fonts for any text element
